answer: The European Central Bank held its deposit facility rate steady at its most recent meeting, citing easing inflation pressures.

results.title: ECB keeps rates on hold as inflation cools
results.content: The European Central Bank left its key deposit rate unchanged, saying inflation is moving toward its 2% target.
